notes: Twelve Earthly Branches (地支). Used for birth month personality nuances in the entertainment Bazi reading.

branches.nuance_zh: 你有着敏锐的感知和快速的思维，善于在复杂环境中找到最优路径。直觉强，反应快，是你行事的最大优势。
branches.nuance_en: You have sharp perception and quick thinking, skilled at finding the optimal path in complex environments. Strong intuition and fast reactions are your greatest advantages.

branches.nuance_zh: 你以踏实和坚韧著称，一旦确定方向便埋头苦干，不轻言放弃。你的毅力和耐力是将大目标变为现实的核心动力。
branches.nuance_en: Known for groundedness and resilience, once you set a direction you work diligently without giving up easily. Your perseverance and endurance are the core power that turns big goals into reality.

branches.nuance_zh: 你有着天生的勇气和冲劲，不畏挑战，喜欢走在前面开拓新路。你的热情和勇气能激励周围的人，但需要注意冲动带来的风险。
branches.nuance_en: You have innate courage and drive, unafraid of challenges, preferring to blaze new trails. Your enthusiasm and bravery inspire those around you—just be mindful of the risks that come with impulsiveness.

branches.nuance_zh: 你温柔机智，善于在人际关系中找到舒适的位置。你的直觉灵敏，能感知到他人的情绪，在需要时给予恰到好处的关怀。
branches.nuance_en: You are gentle and clever, skilled at finding a comfortable place in relationships. Your intuition is sharp, sensing others' emotions and offering just the right amount of care when needed.

branches.nuance_zh: 你有着非凡的气场和领袖魅力，天生吸引他人的目光。你的想象力丰富，有时会有一些超出常规的想法，正是这种独特性让你与众不同。
branches.nuance_en: You have extraordinary presence and charisma, naturally drawing others' attention. Your imagination is rich and you sometimes have ideas outside the norm—this very uniqueness is what sets you apart.

branches.nuance_zh: 你深思熟虑，行事低调，但内心有着敏锐的洞察力和深远的谋划。你不轻易表露内心，但一旦决定便会稳步推进，令人刮目相看。
branches.nuance_en: You are thoughtful and understated, but inside you harbor sharp insight and long-range strategy. You rarely reveal your inner world, but once you decide on something you advance steadily, impressing all who watch.

branches.nuance_zh: 你充满活力，自由奔放，追求心中的远方。你对生活充满热情，不喜欢被约束，最好的状态是在广阔的空间里自由驰骋。
branches.nuance_en: You are full of energy, free-spirited, and always chasing the distant horizon. You embrace life with passion and dislike being constrained—your best state is galloping freely in open space.

branches.nuance_zh: 你温柔善良，富有同理心，善于照顾他人的感受。你的内心世界丰富而柔软，在艺术和情感的表达上有着天然的才华。
branches.nuance_en: You are gentle and kind-hearted with strong empathy, skilled at caring for others' feelings. Your inner world is rich and soft, with natural talent for artistic and emotional expression.

branches.nuance_zh: 你聪明机智，思维灵活，善于应对各种复杂局面。你的创造力和幽默感是你最大的魅力，能让周围的人在轻松中感受到你的智慧。
branches.nuance_en: You are clever and witty with flexible thinking, skilled at handling complex situations. Your creativity and humor are your greatest charms—allowing others to experience your intelligence in a lighthearted way.

branches.nuance_zh: 你注重细节，有很强的观察力和分辨能力。你对自己要求严格，努力在工作和生活中做到最好。你的专业性和认真态度是旁人尊重你的重要原因。
branches.nuance_en: You are detail-oriented with strong observation and discernment. You hold yourself to high standards, striving to do your best in work and life. Your professionalism and seriousness earn you others' respect.

branches.nuance_zh: 你忠诚正直，对朋友和原则始终如一。你有强烈的道德感和正义感，不愿意做出违背良心的事。你的可靠性是你最宝贵的品质。
branches.nuance_en: You are loyal and upright, consistent toward friends and principles. You have a strong sense of morality and justice, unwilling to act against your conscience. Your reliability is your most precious quality.

branches.nuance_zh: 你纯真善良，对生活充满热情，享受生命中简单的快乐。你的宽容和大度让你赢得众多朋友，你的快乐也能轻易感染周围的人。
branches.nuance_en: You are pure-hearted and good-natured, enthusiastic about life and appreciating simple pleasures. Your tolerance and generosity win you many friends, and your happiness easily spreads to those around you.
